org.docgene.main

Interface FileGenerationType


  • public interface FileGenerationType
    The file generation type.
    Since:
    1.6.3

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static char GENERATE_ALWAYS
      Always generate the file.
      static char GENERATE_IF_NOT_EXIST
      Only generate the file if it does not exist.
      static char GENERATE_NEVER
      Never generate the file.

    • Field Detail

      • GENERATE_ALWAYS

        static final char GENERATE_ALWAYS
        Always generate the file.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • GENERATE_NEVER

        static final char GENERATE_NEVER
        Never generate the file.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • GENERATE_IF_NOT_EXIST

        static final char GENERATE_IF_NOT_EXIST
        Only generate the file if it does not exist.
        See Also:
